name: headless-slide-builder-js
description: Headless AI-assisted PowerPoint slide builder with designer themes, visual review prompts, image roles, brand support, and quality reports.

scripts.build:demo: node src/index.js --content input/content.json --theme input/theme.json --out output/generated_deck.pptx --plan-out output/planned_content.json --notes output/speaker_notes.md --image-catalog output/image_catalog.json --preview output/preview --contact-sheet output/contact_sheet.png
scripts.preview: node src/index.js --content input/content.json --theme input/theme.json --out output/generated_deck.pptx --preview output/preview --contact-sheet output/contact_sheet.png
